common.finances_overview: Here's what's happening with your finances today.

ai.advisor_subtitle: Personalized financial guidance powered by multiple LLMs.
ai.initial_greeting: Hello {{name}}! I'm your Qantara AI assistant. How can I help you with your finances today?
ai.error_message: I'm sorry, I'm having trouble connecting to my brain right now. Please try again later.

hero.badge: MOROCCO FINTECH CENTER — BACKED BY 15+ BANKS
hero.subtitle: Qantara delivers next-generation payments, lending, and wealth management — built for Africa's most promising fintech frontier and scaling globally.

services.label: Core Services
services.subtitle: Purpose-built financial infrastructure designed for Morocco's unique market — and ready to scale across continents.
services.service1_desc: Seamless payment infrastructure connecting mobile wallets, merchant POS, and cross-border transfers.
services.service2_desc: AI-powered credit scoring and micro-lending for the 15 million unbanked Moroccans and SMEs.
services.service3_desc: Robo-advisory and micro-investing tools making wealth building accessible to every Moroccan.

footer.tagline: Building the financial infrastructure that Morocco — and the world — deserves. From Morocco to the World.
footer.rights: All rights reserved. Made in Morocco

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Have questions about our API, licensing, or enterprise solutions? Our team is ready to assist you.
contact.success_message: Thank you for reaching out. We will get back to you shortly.
contact.info_subtitle: Whether you're looking to partner, invest, or simply learn more about our fintech infrastructure, we're here to connect.
contact.hq_address:
Casablanca Finance City
Tour CFC, Casa-Anfa
Casablanca, Morocco

opportunity.label: Why Morocco
opportunity.title: Africa's Gateway to Global Finance
opportunity.subtitle: Morocco sits at the crossroads of Africa, Europe, and the Middle East — with regulatory momentum, a massive diaspora, and a digitally-connected young population ready for fintech.
opportunity.image_caption: Casablanca, Morocco — Africa's Gateway to Global Finance
opportunity.feature1_desc: Morocco Fintech Center backed by 15+ banks and government — with sandbox programs and streamlined licensing.
opportunity.feature2_desc: $10B+ annual remittances from Europe create a massive cross-border payments opportunity.
opportunity.feature3_desc: Data protection law (CNDP), onshore hosting, and EU adequacy path — enterprise-grade compliance from day one.
opportunity.feature4_desc: Draft crypto regulation and Central Bank Digital Currency exploration opening blockchain-native fintech services.

roadmap.label: Growth Roadmap
roadmap.title: From Morocco to the World
roadmap.subtitle: A phased strategy: prove locally, scale regionally, dominate globally.
roadmap.phase1_desc: Build MVP targeting one segment in Morocco. Pilot with early users, join Morocco Fintech Center for mentorship. Validate product-market fit.
roadmap.phase2_desc: Incorporate legal entity. Secure payment license or bank partnership. Launch full product, build user base, seek seed funding.
roadmap.phase3_desc: Enter Tunisia, Ivory Coast, Senegal. Adapt for Francophone markets. Regional partnerships and Series A funding.
roadmap.phase4_desc: EU entity in France or Malta. Target Moroccan diaspora. Comply with GDPR, PSD3, and AI Act. Visa Fast Track partnerships.
roadmap.phase5_desc: North America, Middle East, and Asia. B2B API platform. Maintain Moroccan DNA with global technology and funding leverage.

stats.label: Market Opportunity
stats.title: Morocco's Fintech Frontier
stats.subtitle: A massive, underserved market with the infrastructure ready for digital disruption.

verticals.label: Innovation Verticals
verticals.title: Beyond Payments: The Full Stack
verticals.subtitle: Nine technology verticals powering the next decade of financial innovation.
verticals.insurtech_desc: Micro-insurance for agriculture, health, and on-demand policies.
verticals.wealthtech_desc: Robo-advisors, micro-investing apps, and AI-driven finance.
verticals.regtech_desc: KYC/AML automation, compliance tools, and fraud detection.
verticals.blockchain_desc: Crypto exchanges, tokenized assets, and stablecoin remittances.
verticals.embedded_desc: In-app payments, POS lending, and insurance embedded.
verticals.openbanking_desc: API-driven aggregation, BaaS modules, and payment services.
verticals.crowdfunding_desc: P2P lending, equity crowdfunding for SMEs, and real estate.
verticals.greenfinance_desc: Climate micro-loans, carbon credits, and ESG impact investing.
verticals.gigfinance_desc: Earned-wage access, freelancer payments, and micro-pensions.
